title: Tom's Simple Storage Mod - Ashen 16x
description: Ashen 16x textures for Tom's Simple Storage Mod
body:
Replaces Tom's Simple Storage Mod's block and item textures with new ones matching the Ashen 16x resource pack.

This version is currently only for Minecraft 1.20.1.

View the gallery to see the changes.

Credits:
[Aim_Boot](https://modrinth.com/user/Aim_Boot) ([Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen)) & [tom5454](https://modrinth.com/user/tom5454) ([Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage))
